heading: Action on reports of selection boards for promotion to brigadier general or major general
label: 20217 Action on reports of selection boards for promotion to brigadier general or major general

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: After reviewing a report received under recommending officers on the Space Force officer list for promotion to the grade of brigadier general or major general, but before submitting the report to the Secretary of Defense, the Secretary of the Air Force may, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the Air Force, adjust the placement of officers as recommended in the report in order to ensure that sufficient number of officers on both sustained and non-sustained duty are promoted to meet the requirements of the Space Force to fill general officer vacancies.section 20215 of this title

children.heading: .—Report
children.label: b .—Report
children.text: Whenever the Secretary of the Air Force uses the authority under subsection (a), the Secretary shall submit to the Committees on Armed Services of the Senate and House of Representatives a report informing the committees that the authority has been used and the reason for the use of the authority.
